violations.text: An employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Beverage was moved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Sink was drained and refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Working containers of oil are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Several clean and sanitized food storage containers were observed with sticker residue and stacked within each other. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Staff observed with long, painted nails. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of food and debris: -stand mixer -potato cutter. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
Sink & Surface sanitizer in the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million. PIC drained sink and refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and walk-in gaskets and the bottom shelf of the salad refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
the non-food contact surface of the cold table (inside storage area) has an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The door to the outside, located in by dumpsters, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

Slicer was observed in poor repair paint peeling from base of equipment (impacting ability to be properly cleaned and sanitized). Grip missing teeth. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2024
Area for refuse was observed with an accumulation of trash and litter. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The walls behind dish storage rack is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Booster turned on during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Slicer was observed in poor repair paint peeling from base of equipment (impacting ability to be properly cleaned and sanitized). Grip missing teeth. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The walls behind dish storage rack is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The light bulb in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Rodent droppings were observed on the floor in the dry storage area. Physical facilities should be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back entrance of school, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Hair was observed in Cambro of smoothie beverage. Food was voluntarily disposed by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

Area for refuse was observed with litter, foliage, and soil residue on ground and surrounding grass area. An area for refuse, returnables, and recyclables must be maintained cleaned and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The drain plug for the outside middle dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Women's restroom wall was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2023
Ice accumulation was observed on pipes in walk-in freezer. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
